frontmatter.name: wandb
frontmatter.description: Weights & Biases (W&B) API for ML experiment tracking, LLM observability (Weave), run management, and artifact versioning. Use when user mentions "W&B", "Weights & Biases", "wandb", "Weave", "experiment tracking", "ML runs", "model artifacts", or "LLM tracing".

frontmatter.name: webflow
frontmatter.description: Webflow API for CMS and sites. Use when user mentions "Webflow", "webflow.com", "webflow.io", shares a Webflow link, "update Webflow", or asks about Webflow site.

frontmatter.name: weread
frontmatter.description: WeRead (微信读书) API for searching books, browsing your bookshelf, and reading your notes, highlights, reviews, and reading statistics. Use when the user mentions "WeRead", "微信读书", "WeChat Reading", "weread.qq.com", "我的书架", "阅读时长", "划线", "读书笔记", or asks to search the WeRead bookstore, check reading progress, export highlights, or get personalised book recommendations.

frontmatter.name: wix
frontmatter.description: Wix API for website management. Use when user mentions "Wix", "wix.com", "wixsite.com", shares a Wix link, "Wix site", or asks about Wix CMS.

frontmatter.name: workflow-migration
frontmatter.description: VM0 migration helper for Claude Code workflows. Use when user says "migrate to VM0", "move to VM0", "convert skill to VM0", or asks about migrating local Claude Code workflows.

frontmatter.name: workos
frontmatter.description: WorkOS API for enterprise SSO, SCIM directory sync, RBAC fine-grained authorization, and audit logs. Use when user mentions "WorkOS", "SSO", "SAML", "SCIM", "directory sync", "enterprise authentication", "audit log", or "fine-grained authorization".

frontmatter.name: wrike
frontmatter.description: Wrike API for project management. Use when user mentions "Wrike", "wrike.com", shares a Wrike link, "Wrike task", or asks about Wrike workspace.

frontmatter.name: x
frontmatter.description: X (Twitter) API for tweets and profiles. Use when user mentions "X", "Twitter", "x.com", "twitter.com", shares a tweet link, "check X", or asks about social media posts.

frontmatter.name: xero
frontmatter.description: Xero API for accounting. Use when user mentions "Xero", "accounting", "invoices", "bookkeeping", or asks about financial management.

frontmatter.name: youtube
frontmatter.description: YouTube API for videos and channels. Use when user mentions "YouTube", "youtube.com", "youtu.be", shares a video link, "channel stats", or asks about video content.

frontmatter.name: zapier
frontmatter.description: Zapier API for workflow automation. Use when user mentions "Zapier", "zap", "automation", or asks about connecting apps.

frontmatter.name: zapsign
frontmatter.description: ZapSign API for e-signatures. Use when user mentions "ZapSign", "e-signature", "sign document", or Brazilian e-signature.

frontmatter.name: zendesk
frontmatter.description: Zendesk API for customer support. Use when user mentions "Zendesk", "support ticket", "customer service", or help desk.

frontmatter.name: zep
frontmatter.description: Zep API for long-term memory and conversation history management in AI agents. Use when user mentions "Zep", "conversation memory", "session memory", "memory search", "user facts", "agent memory", or "long-term memory".

frontmatter.name: zeptomail
frontmatter.description: ZeptoMail API for transactional email. Use when user mentions "ZeptoMail", "transactional email", "send email", or Zoho email.
